title: polygala paniculata var. normalis
intro: Polygala paniculata var. normalis, also known as Yuan Zhi, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the milkwort family. Traditionally, it has been used in Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and sedative effects. The health benefits of Polygala paniculata var. normalis include reducing stress and anxiety, improving sleep quality, and alleviating symptoms of insomnia, as well as its potential to help with cardiovascular health and lowering blood pressure. In herbal preparations, Polygala paniculata var. normalis is often combined with other herbs to create teas, tinctures, and capsules, which can be consumed to promote relaxation and overall well-being.
